title: The Jute Companies (Nationalisation) Act, 1980
full_text: The Jute Companies (Nationalisation) Act, 1980 जूट कंपनी (राष्‍ट्रीयकरण) अधिनियम, 1980 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198062 Act Number: 62 Enactment Date: 1980-12-21 Act Year: 1980 Short Title: The Jute Companies (Nationalisation) Act, 1980 Hindi Title: जूट कंपनी (राष्‍ट्रीयकरण) अधिनियम, 1980 Long Title: An Act to provide for the acquisition and transfer of the undertakings of the jute companies, specified in the First Schedule with a view to securing the proper management of such undertakings so as to subserve the interests of the general public by ensuring the continued manufacture, production and distribution of articles made of jute, which are essential to the needs of the economy of the country and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Textiles Enforcement Date: 21-12-1980 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Jute Companies (Nationalisation) Act, 1980 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ACQUISITION AND TRANSFER OF THE UNDERTAKINGS OF THE JUTE COMPANIES CHAPTER III PAYMENT OF AMOUNTS CHAPTER IV MANAGEMENT, ETC., OF THE UNDERTAKINGS OF THE JUTE COMPANIES CHAPTER V PROVISIONS RELATING TO EMPLOYEES OF THE JUTE COMPANIES CHAPTER VI COMMISSIONER OF PAYMENTS CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Transfer to, and vesting in, the Central Government of the undertakings of the jute companies. Section 4. General Power of vesting. Section 5. Jute companies to be liable for certain prior liabilities. Section 6. Power of Central Government to direct vesting of the undertakings of the jute companies in Jute Manufactures Corporation. Section 7. Payment of amount. Section 8. Payment of further amount. Section 9. Management, etc., of the undertakings of the jute companies. Section 10. Duty of persons in charge of management of the undertakings to deliver all assets, etc. Section 11. Duty of persons to account for assets, etc., in their possession. Section 12. Continuance of employees. Section 13. Provident fund and other funds. Section 14. Appointment of Commissioner of Payments. Section 15. Payment by Central Government to the Commissioner. Section 16. Certain powers of Central Government or Jute Manufactures Corporation. Section 17. Claims to be made to the Commissioner. Section 18. Priority of Claims. Section 19. Examination of claims. Section 20. Admission or rejection of claims. Section 21. Disbursement of money by the Commissioner. Section 22. Disbursement of amounts to the jute companies. Section 23. Undisbursed or unclaimed amounts to be deposited with the general revenue account. Section 24. Act to have overriding effect. Section 25. Assumption of liability. Section 26. Management to continue to vest in certain persons until alternative arrangements have been made. Section 27. Contracts to cease to have effect unless ratified by the Central Government or Jute Manufactures Corporation. Section 28. Penalties. Section 29. Offences by companies. Section 30. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 31. Delegation of powers. Section 32. Power to make rules. Section 33. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
